title: Appendicularia pullei
taxonomy: Appendicularia pullei is classified within the phylum Chordata, specifically within the class Appendicularia. It belongs to the order Appendicularia and family Oikopleuridae. Appendicularia pullei is a species of larvacean, a type of small marine animal. This species is closely related to other appendicularians, such as Appendicularia inopinata. The exact classification may vary depending on the source or the latest scientific research.
benefits: Appendicularia pullei is a type of tunicate, a marine invertebrate, and its health benefits are not well-documented. properties: Appendicularia pullei, commonly known as the appendicularian or the "sea walnut," is a marine animal that has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties.
